fields.name: Path of Steel
fields.description: The martial path of warriors, soldiers, and those who live by the blade. Steel practitioners master combat, defense, and physical prowess.

fields.name: Path of Whispers
fields.description: The shadowed path of rogues, spies, and those who move unseen. Whisper practitioners excel at stealth, subterfuge, and striking from darkness.

fields.name: Path of Voice
fields.description: Performers whose magic resonates through song, story, and presence.

fields.name: Path of the Chosen
fields.description: The devoted path of acolytes, priests, and those sworn to higher powers. Chosen practitioners channel faith and serve ideals greater than themselves.

fields.name: Path of Tomes
fields.description: Scholars who unlock magic through careful study and written lore.

fields.name: Path of the Voice
fields.description: The social path of courtiers, diplomats, and performers. Voice practitioners master persuasion, presence, and the art of influence.

fields.name: Path of the Tome
fields.description: The scholarly path of academics, sages, and seekers of knowledge. Tome practitioners pursue understanding of the world's mysteries and magical arts.
